title: Valmiki Ramayana – Sampurna Katha
author: Maharishi Valmiki
description: Valmiki rachit mool Sanskrit Ramayana ki sampurna kahani — Shri Ram ke janm se lekar Lanka vijay aur Ayodhya wapsi tak. Har kaand mein Dharma, prem aur tyaag ki anokhi gaatha suniye.

episodes.title: Baal Kaand – Shri Ram ka Divya Janm
episodes.description: Raja Dashrath ki putreshti yagya se hua Shri Ram, Lakshman, Bharat aur Shatrughna ka divya janm. Vishwamitra ka aashram raksha aur Sita Swayamvar.

episodes.title: Ayodhya Kaand – Vanvas ki Kahani
episodes.description: Kaikeyi ke do vardaan aur Shri Ram ka 14 varsh ka vanvas. Dashrath ka dukh, Bharat ki virahini bhakti aur padukaon ka raaj.

episodes.title: Sundar Kaand – Hanuman ki Lanka Yatra
episodes.description: Pawan-putra Hanuman ka samudra laanghan, Sita mata se bhet, Lanka dahan aur Shri Ram ke paas Sita ki khabar lekar wapsi.

title: Mahabharata – Dharma Yudh ki Mahagaatha
author: Maharishi Vedvyas
description: Kurukshetra ke maidaan mein Pandavon aur Kauravon ke beech mahaan sangharsh. Bhishma Pratigya se lekar Gita Updesh aur antim vijay tak — Vedvyas rachit is mahakavya ki romanchak kahani.

episodes.title: Adi Parva – Hastinapur ka Arambh
episodes.description: Bhishma ki pratigya, Pandavon aur Kauravon ka bachpan, Dronacharya ki shiksha aur Eklavya ki dard bhari kahani.

episodes.title: Bhagavad Gita – Arjun ko Shri Krishna ka Gyan
episodes.description: Kurukshetra ke maidan mein Arjun ka vishad aur Shri Krishna dwara diya gaya Atma, Karma aur Dharma ka amartulya updesh.

episodes.title: Draupadi Cheerharan – Anyay ki Parakashtha
episodes.description: Dyut sabha mein Yudhishthir ki haar, Draupadi ka apman aur Bhim ka pratigya — Mahabharat ka sabse hriday-vidaraaak prasang.

title: Akbar-Birbal ki Mashhoor Kahaniyan
author: Lok Katha Sangrah
description: Mughal Samrat Akbar ke darabar mein Birbal ki buddhimani aur haazirzawaabi ke mashhoor qisse. Har kahani ek alag seekh deti hai — common sense aur samajhdaari ki duniya mein.

episodes.title: Agra mein Kawwon ki Ganana
episodes.description: Akbar ne Birbal ko Agra ke tamam kawwon ki sankhya ginne ka farmaan diya — Birbal ne aisa jawab diya ki Akbar bhi hans pade.

episodes.title: Teen Sawalon ka Jawab
episodes.description: Ek videshi pandit ne Akbar ke darbar ko teen achhoot sawaalon se chunauti di — sirf Birbal ne apni hoshiyari se jawaab diya.

title: Tenali Rama – Vijaynagaraa ke Vichitra Qisse
author: Lok Katha Sangrah
description: Vijayanagar Samraajya ke Maharaj Krishnadevaraay ke darabar mein Tenali Rama ke chaturi bhari kahaniyan. Har qisse mein hassi, gyaan aur adbhut buddhimani ka sangam.

episodes.title: Tenali aur Teen Hajar Sona Mudrayen
episodes.description: Raja ne ek mushkil shart rakhi — Tenali ne aise hoshiyari se uska hal nikala ki poora darbar dang rah gaya.

episodes.title: Billi aur Dudh ka Kissa
episodes.description: Rajmata ki billi dudh piti thi — Tenali ne ek aisa totkaa sochha jisne sab ko hasaaya bhi aur sabak bhi diya.

title: Indian Ghost Stories – Bhootiya Daastanein
author: Ruskin Bond
description: Pahaadon ki tanhaai, andheri raaton aur purani haveli mein chupaai bhayaanak aatmaon ki kahaniyan. Ruskin Bond ki kalam se nikli ye daraavni daastanein ek anokha khauff paida karti hain.

episodes.title: Sar-kata Sawaar – Mussoorie ki Sarak
episodes.description: Mussoorie ki aek sunsan sadak par raat ko ek sar-kata sawaar dikhta hai — teen dosto ka woh safar jinhe apni aankho par yakeen nahi raha.

episodes.title: Dak Bungalow ki Aatma
episodes.description: Do musaafir ek veeraane dak bungalow mein raat kaatten hain jahan ek purani aatma ka bhed chupaaya hua hai — Ruskin Bond ki chhayavaadi bhoot kahani.

title: Darr ki Daastanein – Hindi Horror Collection
author: Sundarlal Bahuguna
description: Uttarakhand aur Himachal ke gaanvon mein sunaai dene waali sacchi bhoot-pret ki kahaniyan. Pahaadon mein raat, jungle mein akelaapan aur andheron mein chhupi awaazein.

episodes.title: Jungle mein Raat – Ek Sacchi Kahani
episodes.description: Uttarakhand ke ghane jungle mein ek woodcutter ki sacchi dastaan jo ek raat andhero mein kho gaya — aur jo mila wo insaan nahi tha.

episodes.title: Purani Haveli ka Raaz
episodes.description: Rajasthan ki ek bandh haveli ka wo raaz jo peedhiyon se chupaaya gaya tha — ek naujawan ne jab raaz kholne ki koshish ki toh…

title: Panchatantra – Sampurna Kahaniyan
author: Vishnu Sharma
description: Vishnu Sharma rachit pracheen Bharatiya neeti-kathaon ka sangreh. Janwaron ke maध्यam se diye gaye gyaan ke ye qisse bacchon aur baadon dono ke liye utne hi aaj bhi prasangik hain.

episodes.title: Chattur Khargosh aur Sher
episodes.description: Jungle ka zaalim sher roz ek janwar ko khaata tha — ek chhote khargosh ne apni buddhimani se poore jungle ko azaad karaa diya.

episodes.title: Baatonla Kachhua – Chup Rehna Seekho
episodes.description: Ek kachhua dono haanso ke saath ek dande ke sahaare urna chahta tha — lekin uski baton ne use musibat mein daal diya. Mool seekh: Moun hi sone ka haar hai.

episodes.title: Neela Giddar – Jhooth ka Anjaam
episodes.description: Ek giddar nile rang ke drum mein gir gaya aur jungle ka raja ban gaya — par ek din uski asli awaaz ne sab raaz khol diya.

title: Jataka Kathayein – Buddh ke Poorv Janmon ki Kahaniyan
author: Buddhist Lok Parampara
description: Mahatma Buddh ke poorv janmon ki prem, sahishnuta aur gyan se bhari 2500 saal purani kahaniyan. Bacchon ke liye sarvakalik sheershtha neeti-kathaon mein se ek.

episodes.title: Hiran aur Sone ka Mahal
episodes.description: Ek sone ke rang ka hiran aur uski shaan — Raja ne usse maarne ki koshish ki par hiran ki sachaai ne Raja ka dil bhi badal diya.

episodes.title: Bandar aur Magarmach – Dosti aur Dhoka
episodes.description: Ek bandar aur magarmach ki dosti — jabki magarmach ki patni ko bandar ka dil khaana tha. Bandar ne buddhimani se apni jaan bachaayi.

title: Prachin Bharat ka Chupaaya Itihas
author: Dr. Aniruddha Joshi
description: Bharat ki woh vaigyaanik aur saanskritik uplabdhiyaan jo paschimi itihaas mein daba di gayin. Vedic kaal se lekar Gupta Samraajya tak ke gumnaam heroes aur vishwaas-heelag khojein.

episodes.title: Vedic Vigyan – Taaron ki Duniya
episodes.description: Hazar saal pehle Bharat ke rishiyon ne nakshatra vigyan ko itna sateek dhang se paribhashit kiya tha jo aaj bhi aascharychakita karta hai — telescope se bhi pehle.

episodes.title: Sindhu Ghati Sabhyata ka Rahasya
episodes.description: 5000 saal purani duniya ki sabse advitiya nagariya sabhyata — Mohenjo Daro aur Harappa ke nagar achanak kyun khatam ho gaye? Aaj bhi ye rahasya ban hui hai.

episodes.title: Chanakya aur Chandragupta – Samrajya ka Nirman
episodes.description: Ek garib brahmin aur ek vanawaasi ladke ne milkar poore Bharat ko ek soot mein kaise piroya — Chanakya Neeti aur Maurya Samraajya ki romanchak daastaan.

title: Bharat ki Avishkar Gaatha – Science ka Itihas
author: Dr. Priya Nair
description: Aryabhatta ka shunya, Sushruta ki surgery, Baudhaayan ka Pythagoras theorem — Bharat ke woh mahaan vaigyaanik aur ganiteegy jinhone vishwa ko naye raste dikhaayen.

episodes.title: Aryabhatta – Shunya ka Aavishkaar
episodes.description: Panchwin sadi ke mahaan ganiteegy Aryabhatta ne shunya aur dashmlav pranali di — aaj ki poori digital duniya usi shunya ki neev par khadi hai.

episodes.title: Sushruta – Duniya ke Pehle Surgeon
episodes.description: 2600 saal pehle Varanasi mein Sushruta ne plastic surgery aur cataract operation kiye — aaj ke modern medicine ne unhi ke footsteps follow kiye hain.
